mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.application_id, jp.title AS job_title, o.student_id, sp.real_name AS student_name, o.employer_id, ep.real_name AS employer_name, o.amount, o.pay_status, o.settlement_status, o.start_date, o.end_date, o.create_time FROM order_record o LEFT JOIN job_post jp ON o.job_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN user_profile sp ON o.student_id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile ep ON o.employer_id = ep.user_id WHERE o.student_id = #{userId} OR o.employer_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.application_id, jp.title AS job_title, o.student_id, sp.real_name AS student_name, o.employer_id, ep.real_name AS employer_name, o.amount, o.pay_status, o.settlement_status, o.start_date, o.end_date, o.create_time FROM order_record o LEFT JOIN job_post jp ON o.job_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN user_profile sp ON o.student_id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile ep ON o.employer_id = ep.user_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
